title: andropogon neesii subvar. selloanus
intro: Andropogon neesii subvar. selloanus, also known as broomgrass, is a type of grass species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. Some of the health benefits of using broomgrass include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and even help manage diabetes. Broomgrass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
